topics.topic_ar: العلاقات متعددة المستويات والتعددية (Polyinstantiation) في قواعد البيانات
topics.query_en: Polyinstantiation database security multilevel relations tutorial
topics.reason: Students struggle to grasp how multiple records with the exact same primary key can exist simultaneously at different security clearance levels without violating integrity rules.

topics.topic_en: Mandatory Access Control (MAC) and Security Models
topics.topic_ar: التحكم الإلزامي في الوصول (MAC) ونماذج الأمان
topics.query_en: Mandatory Access Control MAC database security Bell-LaPadula
topics.query_ar: شرح Mandatory Access Control أمن قواعد البيانات
topics.reason: The rigid, system-enforced rules of MAC and understanding abstract security models like 'read down, write up' (Bell-LaPadula) are highly counterintuitive.

topics.topic_ar: التحكم التقديري في الوصول (DAC) وانتشار الصلاحيات
topics.query_en: Discretionary Access Control DAC SQL grant revoke propagation
topics.query_ar: شرح Discretionary Access Control قواعد البيانات GRANT REVOKE
topics.reason: Tracking the propagation of privileges through GRANT options and understanding the cascading effects of REVOKE operations requires careful logical tracing.

topics.topic_en: Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) and Separation of Duties
topics.topic_ar: التحكم في الوصول المبني على الأدوار (RBAC) وفصل المهام
topics.query_en: Role-Based Access Control RBAC database security separation of duties
topics.query_ar: شرح Role-Based Access Control RBAC أمن قواعد البيانات
topics.reason: Designing effective role hierarchies and implementing mutually exclusive roles to enforce separation of duties can be complex in real-world database schemas.

topics.topic_en: Database Security Threats and Injection Countermeasures
topics.topic_ar: تهديدات أمن قواعد البيانات وطرق الحماية من حقن SQL
topics.query_en: Database security threats SQL injection prevention countermeasures
topics.query_ar: تهديدات أمن قواعد البيانات SQL Injection شرح
topics.reason: Identifying vulnerabilities in database applications and implementing the correct programmatic countermeasures requires bridging database theory with secure coding practices.
